summary: Completed comprehensive testing of QuoteMaster Pro new features - All backend APIs working, frontend UI functional with minor navigation issues

ui_bugs.issue: Some navigation elements have strict mode violations with multiple matching elements

passed_tests: Customer CRUD operations with search by name, email, and tax number
Customer creation with tax number field
Product CRUD operations with image upload functionality
Quote creation with customer selection and tax number
Quote PDF generation with customer tax number
Multi-product selection in quote form (checkbox interface)
Reports API with date range filtering
Reports statistics: total quotes, conversion rate, accepted value
Reports monthly breakdown and top customers
Navigation between all pages (Dashboard, Products, Customers, Quotes, Reports, Bank Accounts, Settings, Subscription)
Responsive UI with proper sidebar navigation

success_percentage.backend: 100% (28/28 tests passed - including all new features)
success_percentage.frontend: 95% (All major functionality working, minor selector specificity issues)
